top_signals.title: Oil prices near pre-war levels  —  but persistent supply risks could spark a rebound, analysts warn
top_signals.summary: Commodity strategists warn that Iranian leverage in the Strait of Hormuz will continue to weigh on oil markets and shipping costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NZ Rate Hike Bets Dialed Back on US-Iran Peace Progress
top_signals.summary: New Zealand economists are dialing back expectations for a Reserve Bank interest-rate increase next week, saying early signs of peace between the US and Iran have eased inflation risks enough to justify keeping borrowing costs on hold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oil Jumps After Crude Tanker Hit in Latest Middle East Flare-Up - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Jumps After Crude Tanker Hit in Latest Middle East Flare-Up  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Spanish Inflation Unexpectedly Holds Well Above ECB Target - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Spanish Inflation Unexpectedly Holds Well Above ECB Target  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: U.S. commercial crude oil inventories have decreased in June
top_signals.summary: For the week ending June 19, 2026, U.S. refineries processed 17.1 million barrels per day (b/d) of crude oil, down 81,000 b/d from the previous week, and they operated at 96.1% capacity utilization. Gasoline production averaged 9.5 million b/d, and distillate production increased to 5.2 million b/d.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court Leaves Trump’s Fed, Citizenship Gambits for Last - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Supreme Court Leaves Trump’s Fed, Citizenship Gambits for Last  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan falls in gut-wrenching fashion as Brazil strikes late to win World Cup clash
top_signals.summary: Brazil will play the winner of Tuesday's clash between Cote d'Ivoire and ​Norway on July 5 in New Jersey in the next round.
